name: hallucination
eval_prompt: Evaluate the AI assistant's response for hallucination by checking claims against the provided context. Identify statements that are not supported by the context or are factually incorrect, distinguishing between factual and hallucinated content.

explanation.description: Detailed analysis explaining the hallucination evaluation, including identification of factual alignments and contradictions with the context

hallucination_score.description: Numerical score representing the level of hallucination in the response

factual_alignments.description: List of statements that are factually aligned with the context

contradictions.description: List of statements that contradict or are not supported by the context

hallucination_types.description: Types of hallucination identified in the response

context_coverage.description: How well the response stays within the bounds of the provided context

factual_accuracy.description: Assessment of factual accuracy based on the context

verification_status.description: Status of claim verification against the context

confidence_level.description: Confidence level in the hallucination assessment
